steps.name: root-bootstrap-command-contract
steps.summary: Root bootstrap, build, test, and dev entry contracts established for Apple Silicon Mac.

steps.name: mac-green-test-matrix
steps.summary: Deterministic cross-package Mac matrix passes 297/297 with canonical temp paths and host-independent Windows path parsing.

steps.name: production-shell-fixture-separation
steps.summary: Production starts from trusted-project entry state; fixtures are explicit benchmark-only and mutations fail closed on project mismatch.

steps.name: fresh-clone-mac-baseline-evidence
steps.summary: Fresh-clone bootstrap/test, production browser, 5k integration, and two Electron launch cycles recorded; Windows remains not run and 5k latency is deferred to EQ1.
